creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-02-17 12:43:37 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/sysfsutils     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  These are a set of utilites built upon sysfs, a new virtual filesystem
  in Linux kernel versions 2.5+ that exposes a system's device tree.
  
  WWW:    http://linux-diag.sourceforge.net/Sysfsutils.html
  
  PR:             ports/120414
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2998    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/devel/sysfsutils/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/sysfsutils/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/sysfsutils/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/devel/sysfsutils/pkg-plist (new)
